nodes.label: Node 1: Schema Ingest — Parse external CMMS schema definition.  Handles: 1. I
Node 1: Ingest and parse external CMMS schema definition.      Supports:
Introspect live database schema via SQLAlchemy.
Return True if the SQL data type is a string/text type.
Fetch up to 5 non-null sample values per text column in a single query.     Ret
Parse Fiix API mapper config response.      Fiix returns a mapper config with:
Build SchemaTableInfo objects from parsed schema dictionary.
